---
title: "Z_function"
---

Implementation of the Luescher's Zeta function, 
as in eq. (7) of https://arxiv.org/pdf/1707.05817.

NOTE: For Z_00 in the Center of Mass frame: ec{s}=(0,0,0) [see eq. (3)], l=m=0, gamma=1.


Additional references:

- https://doi.org/10.1016/0550-3213(91)90366-6 (analytic continuation of the Luscher's Zeta function)
- https://doi.org/10.1016/0550-3213(91)90584-K (tabulated values of phi(q))
- https://arxiv.org/abs/1202.2145, see appendix
- https://arxiv.org/pdf/1107.5023: eq. (5) and Eq.(2)+Tab.II for the tabulated energy levels
- https://arxiv.org/pdf/1011.5288. Tab.V for some tabulated values


- `python2` implementation: https://github.com/knippsch/LueschersZetaFunction
    - For `python3` calls, use  
        ```
        -np.arctan(np.pi**1.5*np.sqrt(q2) * 1./np.real(Z(q2, gamma=1., d=np.zeros(3, dtype=int), m_split=1., precision=1e-8)))/(np.pi*q2)
        ```
- Morningstar's implementation: https://github.com/cjmorningstar10/TwoHadronsInBox
    - For a `python` wrapper, see this repo as a template 
      (note that the actual repository needed is a fork of the above `TwoHadronsBox`):
      https://github.com/ebatz/pythib

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`gm2/HVP/Z_function.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/Z_function.py)
:::


## API Reference

### `Z_00_Calculator` {#z_00_calculator}

```python
class Z_00_Calculator
```

Z_00(q2) as in eq. C8 of https://doi.org/10.1016/0550-3213(91)90366-6,
with a cutoff on the norm of the 3-vector ec{n}.    

NOTE: 
There are 2 cutoffs, a small one for the regularization of K_00, 
and a large one that is the unavoidable numerical truncation of the sum over ec{n} in the Z_00(q2) expression.

Additional reference: https://arxiv.org/pdf/hep-lat/0404001, appendix A

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/Z_function.py#L33){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `Z_00_Calculator.__init__` {#z_00_calculator-__init__}

```python
def __init__(self, Lambda_Z3: float, Lambda: float, N_gauss: int, q2_max: float, tol_Z_00_zeroes: float=1e-14)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/Z_function.py#L44){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `Z_00_Calculator.curly_Y_lm` {#z_00_calculator-curly_y_lm}

```python
def curly_Y_lm(self, l: int, m: int, r: np.float64, theta: np.float64, phi: np.float64)
```

\mathcal{Y}_{lm}(r,    heta, \phi) as in eq. 3.14 of https://doi.org/10.1016/0550-3213(91)90366-6

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/Z_function.py#L63){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `Z_00_Calculator.F0` {#z_00_calculator-f0}

```python
def F0(self, x: float) -> float
```

F_0(x) as in eq. (11) of https://arxiv.org/pdf/1707.05817

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/Z_function.py#L68){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `Z_00_Calculator.find_Z_00_zeros` {#z_00_calculator-find_z_00_zeros}

```python
def find_Z_00_zeros(self, q2_min: float, q2_max: float, tol: float=1e-14)
```

Find all zeros of Z_00(q2) in the range [q2_min, q2_max].
Returns a list of q2 values where Z_00(q2) = 0.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/Z_function.py#L79){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `Z_00_Calculator.get_Z_00` {#z_00_calculator-get_z_00}

```python
def get_Z_00(self, q2: float) -> float
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/Z_function.py#L96){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `Z_00_Calculator.get_Z_00_brute_force` {#z_00_calculator-get_z_00_brute_force}

```python
def get_Z_00_brute_force(self, q2: float)
```

This is the brute-force calculation of Z_00.
It should be used only to show that it actually does not converge,
and we need the get_Z_00() method implemented in this class

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/Z_function.py#L124){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `Z_00_Calculator.tan_phi` {#z_00_calculator-tan_phi}

```python
def tan_phi(self, q: float)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/Z_function.py#L134){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `Z_00_Calculator.phi` {#z_00_calculator-phi}

```python
def phi(self, q: float)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/Z_function.py#L139){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
